definitions.name: Vault of Geographically Responsible Curses
definitions.summary: Black ropes connect grudges, cliffs, and households so each curse can be returned accurately.

features.name: grievance map
features.description: Black cords measure injury rather than distance and cross walls freely.

features.name: misaddressed curse jar
features.description: Something inside keeps apologizing to the wrong family.

features.name: seventh-warning shelf
features.description: The empty shelf casts the shadow of a warning nobody admits removing.
